directDownloadAttentionEvent.message: Datanodes automation failed: Ready state not detected.

library-addon.name: F95UE Library Add-on
library-addon.description: Quick-add threads to a personal library and manage entries with a dedicated add-on UI.
library-addon.panelBody: Use the bottom-left page dock to open Library anywhere on F95. Save/Remove appears when you are on a thread page.
library-addon.statusMessage: Library button is available site-wide; quick add is active on thread pages.

masked-direct-addon.name: F95UE Masked + Direct Download Add-on
masked-direct-addon.description: Combines masked-link skipper and direct-download flows into one trusted add-on.
masked-direct-addon.panelBody: This add-on provides masked-link Resolve buttons and direct-download page handling for supported hosts.
masked-direct-addon.statusMessage: Masked-link skipper and direct-download routing are active.

image-repair-addon.name: F95UE Image Repair Add-on
image-repair-addon.description: Automatically retries broken attachment images on F95Zone threads.
image-repair-addon.panelBody: Retries failed attachment images (attachments.f95zone.to). Use Enable / Disable to control whether the watcher is active.
image-repair-addon.statusMessage: Watching for broken images and retrying automatically.
